tagline: Calm Your Mind, Strengthen Your Body
about_text: Present Heart Yoga offers classes, retreats and workshops to strengthen, open and deeply relax the body and mind to help navigate the complexities of life. We offer a range of experiences to reclaim energy, bring balance, find connection, flow and calm.
about_text_2: Discover tranquility and strength where expert instructors guide you through holistic practices to enhance flexibility, balance, and inner peace. Join us for transformative wellness.
promo_text: 🧘‍♀️ Start your journey — First class FREE
meta_description: Present Heart Yoga — Classes, retreats and workshops to strengthen, open and deeply relax the body and mind. Find balance, connection, flow and calm.
meta_keywords: yoga classes, yoga retreats, yoga workshops, meditation, mindfulness, wellness, balance, flexibility

testimonials.text: Present Heart Yoga has transformed my life. The teachers are incredibly knowledgeable and caring, and the studio feels like a sanctuary. I've never felt more balanced and centered.
testimonials.name: Rachel M.

testimonials.text: I was completely new to yoga and felt so welcomed. The beginner classes are perfect and the community is so supportive. My stress levels have completely changed since I started.
testimonials.name: David L.

testimonials.text: The weekend retreat was life-changing. Beautiful location, amazing teachers, and the perfect balance of practice and relaxation. Already booked my next one!
testimonials.name: Sophie K.

faq.question: Do I need to be flexible to start yoga?
faq.answer: Absolutely not! Yoga is for everyone regardless of flexibility. Our beginner classes focus on proper alignment and gradual progress. Flexibility is something you develop through practice, not a prerequisite.

faq.question: What should I bring to my first class?
faq.answer: Just wear comfortable clothing that allows movement. We provide all mats, blocks, straps, and props. Bring water and arrive 10 minutes early for a studio tour.

faq.question: What's included in the monthly membership?
faq.answer: Unlimited access to all in-studio classes, priority booking, discounts on workshops and retreats, plus access to our online class library. No joining fees or contracts.

faq.question: Can I try a class before committing?
faq.answer: Yes! Your first class is completely FREE. It's the perfect way to experience our teaching style, meet the community, and see if it's right for you.

faq.question: What's the difference between Vinyasa and Hatha?
faq.answer: Vinyasa is a flowing, dynamic style where poses are linked with breath. Hatha is slower-paced with longer holds, focusing on alignment and foundational postures. Both are wonderful — we recommend trying each!

faq.question: Do you offer private sessions?
faq.answer: Yes, all our teachers offer private and semi-private sessions. Perfect for personalized attention, specific goals, or working around injuries. Contact us to book.
